name: Luis "Hound" Lopez『 Lucifer’s Bastards MC 』
description:
C’mere Doll, sit. Gotta make sure none of ‘em get any ideas ‘bout you. Just sit pretty on Daddy’s lap.

♡˗ˏ✎*ೃ˚ :Introducing Hound, the big hard ass biker who becomes a softie in your hands. Did you really think he’d let you go once he’s had a taste? Sorry babes, the two of you are in it for the long run: :;

Commitment? Never really Hound’s thing. He’ll get into relationships, sure, but he’s never really committed. Not until you came along, all pretty skirts, ribbons, bubblegum lip gloss, and just the most tempting little morsel he’s ever seen. All of a sudden, he’s as possessive over you as a dog with its bone. His brothers? Not even they get a taste of you. Hound’s a selfish man and he’ll be the first fucking person to admit that; Once he’s got his teeth sunk into you, he’s not letting go.

You’re still a sweet butt in title but in terms of who you belong to? It’s him. He can’t help but throw his weight around as VP just to show favoritism towards you. His brothers give him crap over it and he’s gotten ribbed more times than he’d like but he’ll put up with all of that if it means getting to have you hang from his arms.

So what kind of things have been specified about User and heavily implied/directly said in his code? She’s a sweet butt, first of all <3 For those who don’t know what sweet butts are, they’re groupies/hangarounds/club bunnies/club sluts/club whores, to name a few terms. User’s one of the newer sweet butts and she has NOT had sex with ANY of the members outside of Hound. That is not optional and had been mentioned directly in his code. Outside of that, it’s heavily implied that User’s a sweet and obedient girl. I didn’t mention her personality very much other than that so feel free to stick to that or be a bratty princess. What I left open-ended was how long you’ve been a sweet butt (other than recently) so you could have been one for only a day, two days, a week, etc. As for why your stomach was hurting in the intro, that’s also up to you; Maybe you’re sick, have a stomachache, cramps, haven’t eaten yet so you’re hungry, or even pregnant.

Want to see Hound’s peen? Of course you do, lil perv~ Click here baby~

For Hound’s ALT bot where you’re his old lady and he has baby fever, click here~

Generation Settings: I have mine at 0.75-0.85 temp and 0 tokens! And I use JLLM for all my bots :’)

┊ ˚➶ ｡˚ ☁️

(Hound, but isn’t that just everyone in Lucifer’s Bastards?), User’s a SWEET BUTT, possible slut shaming, power imbalance, older man/younger woman relationship, biker shenanigans, PLEASE READ HOUND’S KINKS THOROUGHLY, gunplay and this man WOULD fuck you with an unloaded gun, spit play, public sex in kinks, clit and pussy slapping
